name: Optimized Travel Planner
code:
async def forward(self, taskInfo, extra_info):
    from collections import Counter
    sub_tasks = []
    agents = []

    # Sub-task 1: Determine transportation from Bakersfield to El Paso
    cot_instruction_1 = "Sub-task 1: Determine the best transportation option from Bakersfield to El Paso."
    cot_agent_1 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking1, answer1 = await cot_agent_1([taskInfo], extra_info, cot_instruction_1, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 1 output: thinking - {thinking1.content}; answer - {answer1.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_1.id}, on transportation from Bakersfield to El Paso, thinking: {thinking1.content}; answer: {answer1.content}')

    # Sub-task 2.1: Select attractions in El Paso
    cot_instruction_21 = "Sub-task 2.1: Based on the output of sub-task 1, select attractions in El Paso."
    cot_agent_21 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking21, answer21 = await cot_agent_21([taskInfo, thinking1, answer1], extra_info, cot_instruction_21, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 2.1 output: thinking - {thinking21.content}; answer - {answer21.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_21.id}, on selecting attractions in El Paso, thinking: {thinking21.content}; answer: {answer21.content}')

    # Sub-task 2.2: Choose restaurants in El Paso
    cot_instruction_22 = "Sub-task 2.2: Based on the output of sub-task 1, choose restaurants in El Paso."
    cot_agent_22 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking22, answer22 = await cot_agent_22([taskInfo, thinking1, answer1], extra_info, cot_instruction_22, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 2.2 output: thinking - {thinking22.content}; answer - {answer22.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_22.id}, on choosing restaurants in El Paso, thinking: {thinking22.content}; answer: {answer22.content}')

    # Sub-task 2.3: Pick accommodations in El Paso
    cot_instruction_23 = "Sub-task 2.3: Based on the output of sub-task 1, pick accommodations in El Paso."
    cot_agent_23 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking23, answer23 = await cot_agent_23([taskInfo, thinking1, answer1], extra_info, cot_instruction_23, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 2.3 output: thinking - {thinking23.content}; answer - {answer23.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_23.id}, on picking accommodations in El Paso, thinking: {thinking23.content}; answer: {answer23.content}')

    # Sub-task 3: Determine transportation from El Paso to Amarillo
    cot_instruction_3 = "Sub-task 3: Determine the best transportation option from El Paso to Amarillo."
    cot_agent_3 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking3, answer3 = await cot_agent_3([taskInfo, thinking1, answer1, thinking21, answer21, thinking22, answer22, thinking23, answer23], extra_info, cot_instruction_3, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 3 output: thinking - {thinking3.content}; answer - {answer3.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_3.id}, on transportation from El Paso to Amarillo, thinking: {thinking3.content}; answer: {answer3.content}')

    # Sub-task 4.1: Select attractions in Amarillo
    cot_instruction_41 = "Sub-task 4.1: Based on the output of sub-task 3, select attractions in Amarillo."
    cot_agent_41 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking41, answer41 = await cot_agent_41([taskInfo, thinking3, answer3], extra_info, cot_instruction_41, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 4.1 output: thinking - {thinking41.content}; answer - {answer41.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_41.id}, on selecting attractions in Amarillo, thinking: {thinking41.content}; answer: {answer41.content}')

    # Sub-task 4.2: Choose restaurants in Amarillo
    cot_instruction_42 = "Sub-task 4.2: Based on the output of sub-task 3, choose restaurants in Amarillo."
    cot_agent_42 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking42, answer42 = await cot_agent_42([taskInfo, thinking3, answer3], extra_info, cot_instruction_42, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 4.2 output: thinking - {thinking42.content}; answer - {answer42.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_42.id}, on choosing restaurants in Amarillo, thinking: {thinking42.content}; answer: {answer42.content}')

    # Sub-task 4.3: Pick accommodations in Amarillo
    cot_instruction_43 = "Sub-task 4.3: Based on the output of sub-task 3, pick accommodations in Amarillo."
    cot_agent_43 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking43, answer43 = await cot_agent_43([taskInfo, thinking3, answer3], extra_info, cot_instruction_43, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 4.3 output: thinking - {thinking43.content}; answer - {answer43.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_43.id}, on picking accommodations in Amarillo, thinking: {thinking43.content}; answer: {answer43.content}')

    # Sub-task 5: Determine transportation from Amarillo to Dallas
    cot_instruction_5 = "Sub-task 5: Determine the best transportation option from Amarillo to Dallas."
    cot_agent_5 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking5, answer5 = await cot_agent_5([taskInfo, thinking3, answer3, thinking41, answer41, thinking42, answer42, thinking43, answer43], extra_info, cot_instruction_5, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 5 output: thinking - {thinking5.content}; answer - {answer5.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_5.id}, on transportation from Amarillo to Dallas, thinking: {thinking5.content}; answer: {answer5.content}')

    # Sub-task 6.1: Select attractions in Dallas
    cot_instruction_61 = "Sub-task 6.1: Based on the output of sub-task 5, select attractions in Dallas."
    cot_agent_61 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking61, answer61 = await cot_agent_61([taskInfo, thinking5, answer5], extra_info, cot_instruction_61, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 6.1 output: thinking - {thinking61.content}; answer - {answer61.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_61.id}, on selecting attractions in Dallas, thinking: {thinking61.content}; answer: {answer61.content}')

    # Sub-task 6.2: Choose restaurants in Dallas
    cot_instruction_62 = "Sub-task 6.2: Based on the output of sub-task 5, choose restaurants in Dallas."
    cot_agent_62 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking62, answer62 = await cot_agent_62([taskInfo, thinking5, answer5], extra_info, cot_instruction_62, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 6.2 output: thinking - {thinking62.content}; answer - {answer62.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_62.id}, on choosing restaurants in Dallas, thinking: {thinking62.content}; answer: {answer62.content}')

    # Sub-task 6.3.1: Determine accommodation requirements in Dallas
    cot_instruction_631 = "Sub-task 6.3.1: Based on the output of sub-task 5, determine accommodation requirements in Dallas."
    cot_agent_631 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking631, answer631 = await cot_agent_631([taskInfo, thinking5, answer5], extra_info, cot_instruction_631, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 6.3.1 output: thinking - {thinking631.content}; answer - {answer631.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_631.id}, on determining accommodation requirements in Dallas, thinking: {thinking631.content}; answer: {answer631.content}')

    # Sub-task 6.3.2: Select appropriate accommodations in Dallas
    cot_instruction_632 = "Sub-task 6.3.2: Based on the output of sub-task 6.3.1, select appropriate accommodations in Dallas."
    cot_agent_632 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking632, answer632 = await cot_agent_632([taskInfo, thinking631, answer631], extra_info, cot_instruction_632, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 6.3.2 output: thinking - {thinking632.content}; answer - {answer632.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_632.id}, on selecting accommodations in Dallas, thinking: {thinking632.content}; answer: {answer632.content}')

    # Sub-task 7: Determine transportation from Dallas to Bakersfield
    cot_instruction_7 = "Sub-task 7: Determine the best transportation option from Dallas to Bakersfield."
    cot_agent_7 = LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.0)
    thinking7, answer7 = await cot_agent_7([taskInfo, thinking5, answer5, thinking61, answer61, thinking62, answer62, thinking632, answer632], extra_info, cot_instruction_7, is_sub_task=True)
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 7 output: thinking - {thinking7.content}; answer - {answer7.content}')
    agents.append(f'CoT agent {cot_agent_7.id}, on transportation from Dallas to Bakersfield, thinking: {thinking7.content}; answer: {answer7.content}')

    # Sub-task 8: Compile the final travel plan
    cot_sc_instruction_8 = "Sub-task 8: Based on the outputs of all previous sub-tasks, compile the final travel plan. It is known that the following travel plans are not correct: [list all incorrect final answers from memory]."
    N = 5
    cot_agents_8 = [LLMAgentBase(['thinking', 'answer'], 'Chain-of-Thought Agent', model=self.node_model, temperature=0.5) for _ in range(N)]
    thinking_mapping_8 = {}
    answer_mapping_8 = {}
    possible_answers_8 = []
    for i in range(N):
        thinking8, answer8 = await cot_agents_8[i]([taskInfo, thinking1, answer1, thinking21, answer21, thinking22, answer22, thinking23, answer23, thinking3, answer3, thinking41, answer41, thinking42, answer42, thinking43, answer43, thinking5, answer5, thinking61, answer61, thinking62, answer62, thinking632, answer632, thinking7, answer7], extra_info, cot_sc_instruction_8, is_sub_task=True)
        agents.append(f'CoT-SC agent {cot_agents_8[i].id}, compiling final travel plan, thinking: {thinking8.content}; answer: {answer8.content}')
        possible_answers_8.append(answer8.content)
        thinking_mapping_8[answer8.content] = thinking8
        answer_mapping_8[answer8.content] = answer8
    answer8 = Counter(possible_answers_8).most_common(1)[0][0]
    thinking8 = thinking_mapping_8[answer8]
    answer8 = answer_mapping_8[answer8]
    sub_tasks.append(f'Sub-task 8 output: thinking - {thinking8.content}; answer - {answer8.content}')

    final_answer = self.make_final_answer(thinking8, answer8, sub_tasks, agents)
    return final_answer
